rationale: Both resulting PRs are equally good: R1's sound approve leaves the names exactly as-diffed (following apply* precedents and Mathlib subgroup patterns), while R2's requested renames (map_proj→preserves_proj/etc, smul_eq_apply→smul_def, applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul→subgroup..., plus docstring) are subjective preference on contested style with no material correctness issue visible in the diff.
